name: System Info
description: Insights add-ons under System health: internet speed test (on-demand + auto-schedule) and a full Docker card — live container stats, compose-stack grouping, start/stop/restart, and one-click image updates — via a loopback sidecar.
author: asorourx

post_install.summary: Run the bundled sidecar (sidecar/sidecar.py) on 127.0.0.1:17796, then approve the sidecar proxy in Settings → Extensions. Speed test needs `speedtest-cli`; the Docker card needs the docker CLI. By default no containers are shown until you set an allowlist (MC_DOCKER_NAME_ALLOW / MC_DOCKER_WORKDIR_PREFIX) or MC_DOCKER_SHOW_ALL=1.
